MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
Plaintiff Curtis W. Gaut in propria persona (he is also the grandson of Plaintiff ROSE MUDD) opposing party

Mr. Gaut represented in open court that the Complaint has been dismissed on April 18th. Based on his representations, the Court vacated its tentative ruling and ordered defendant MICHAEL A. GRAHAM's demurrer off calendar.
Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193
